pages.text: It was a bright, sunny morning in the park. The air smelled of sweet summer, and the birds were singing “chee-chee-chee!” as <name> skipped along the path. Suddenly, he spotted the biggest, juiciest mango hanging high on the tallest tree.
“Oh wow!” <name> said, his eyes wide. “That mango looks so yummy!” He jumped once. He jumped twice. But the mango was too high!
Just then, a colorful butterfly fluttered by. “Hello, <name>! What are you trying to do?” it asked. “I want that mango,” <name> sighed. “But it’s way up there!”
The butterfly thought for a moment and said, “Let’s call for help!” Soon, Chintu the playful puppy came wagging his tail, and Minku the squirrel scampered down from a branch.

“We can do it together!” said Minku. <name> brought his toy blocks from his picnic bag. The puppy helped push them closer, and Minku climbed up to check the branch. Up, up, up they went — butterfly cheering, puppy barking, squirrel chattering!
Finally, *pluck!* The mango came loose and landed softly in <name>’s hands. “Hooray!” everyone shouted.
<name> ran home and shared the mango with his mama and papa. It was sweet and juicy — the best mango ever! Mama smiled and said, “When friends work together, even tall trees can’t stop you!”
And from that day, <name> always remembered — teamwork makes everything sweeter, just like a summer mango! 🍋✨
